stock_uncle_insight.date_header: 7/18 法人與主力大戶主要買超股票

buyer_groups.group_title: 1. 外資大戶：狂掃金融面板，電子股倒貨

stocks.description: 肖年仔，外資狂掃近6萬張群創，面板雙虎跌深反彈，外資在賭底部到了，準備鎖碼。但投信自營卻在倒貨，這是在玩法人對作的把戲，韭菜們別黑白買！
外資大買近5.3萬張玉山金，金融股就是外資的避風港，大盤不穩就躲進來，穩穩賺股息，這套路老狗玩不膩。
外資買超近2.4萬張三商壽，壽險股跟金融一樣，都是外資避險的好標的，穩健防禦，肖年仔別以為沒搞頭。
外資買超近2.2萬張中鋼，傳產龍頭，景氣循環股，外資在低檔卡位，等著景氣復甦拉抬，這就是長線布局的思維。
外資買超近2.2萬張仁寶，電子權值股中少數被外資買的，但買超力道不算特別強，可能只是短線進出，別太認真。
外資買超近2.1萬張中信金，金融股就是香，外資資金避險首選，這盤面就是這樣，錢往穩的地方跑。
外資買超近1.7萬張台中銀，小型金融股也沒放過，外資避險的決心很明顯，就是要把錢藏好。
外資買超近1.7萬張中華電，電信股穩如泰山，大盤震盪時，外資就愛這種定存股，沒什麼爆發力但很安全。
外資買超近1.6萬張長榮航，航空股也是疫後復甦題材，外資在賭解封商機，但投信卻在倒貨，小心別接刀，這盤面很詭異。
外資買超近1.5萬張兆豐金，金融股再一檔，外資這波就是看準金融股的防禦性，肖年仔，學著點。

buyer_groups.group_title: 2. 投信大戶（本土國家隊）：作帳卡位傳產金融，電子股落跑

stocks.description: 投信狂掃近4.8萬張南亞，外資在賣，投信卻在買，這擺明了是投信在作帳，或是看好塑化傳產的低基期反彈，韭菜們要跟上嗎？
投信買超近1.9萬張台新新光金，本土國家隊也愛金融股，跟外資英雄所見略同，都是避險，穩字訣。
投信買超近1.1萬張華南金，金融股穩穩賺，投信作帳也愛這種，沒什麼驚喜但很安心。
投信買超近0.9萬張彰銀，金融股再一檔，投信這波對金融股很積極，就是要把部位撐起來。
投信買超近0.9萬張第一金，金融股就是投信的定存概念股，沒什麼好說的，就是穩。
投信買超近0.8萬張永豐金，金融股買不完，本土國家隊就是愛穩，這就是台灣人的投資哲學。
投信買超近0.7萬張台塑化，傳產龍頭，跟南亞一樣，投信在低檔卡位，準備等著景氣回溫。
投信買超近0.6萬張興富發，營建股，這檔可能跟特定基金的佈局有關，作帳行情，肖年仔別亂猜。
投信買超近0.6萬張華航，跟外資買長榮航一樣，投信也看好航空復甦，但選了華航，這就是法人各自為政，別傻傻跟。
投信買超近0.6萬張統一，食品股，防禦性強，投信在找穩健的標的，這就是大盤不穩時的避風港。

buyer_groups.group_title: 3. 內資主力與實戶：避險盤與權證對沖，電子股倒貨

stocks.description: 自營商買超近0.2萬張永豐金，內資主力也跟著買金融，避險盤很重，或是跟權證避險有關，這就是自營部的日常。
自營商買超近0.1萬張華南金，金融股就是內資的避風港，大盤不穩，錢就往這裡躲。
自營商買超近0.09萬張兆豐金，金融股再一檔，自營商的避險盤很明顯，這不是在做慈善。
自營商買超近0.05萬張三商壽，壽險股也是避險首選，內資外資都愛，這就是市場共識。
自營商買超近0.04萬張大聯大，電子通路股，可能是短線操作或權證避險，自營商的單子通常跑得快。
自營商買超近0.03萬張台虹，軟板廠，可能是有特定題材或權證避險，自營商就是愛抓這種短線機會。
自營商買超近0.03萬張億光，LED股，自營商的短線操作居多，這種小單通常是隔日沖或避險盤。
自營商買超近0.02萬張上海商銀，金融股，避險盤，自營商就是跟著大方向走。
自營商買超近0.01萬張和益，化學股，短線操作或權證避險，這種小單通常是試水溫。
自營商買超近0.01萬張大成，食品股，防禦性，自營商也知道大盤不穩要找安全牌。

strategies.strategy_title: 策略一：高檔避險與資金避風港（金融、傳產）
strategies.strategy_content: 肖年仔，大盤在高檔震盪，外資、投信、自營商三大法人不約而同把資金從高風險的電子股撤出來，轉進金融、傳產這些避風港。你看玉山金、中信金、兆豐金、永豐金這些金融股，還有中鋼、台塑化這些傳產龍頭，都被法人狂掃。這就是典型的避險操作，穩穩賺股息，等風頭過了再說。國際上大宗商品價格蠢蠢欲動，也讓傳產股有了點想像空間，別傻傻去追高電子股了。

strategies.strategy_title: 策略二：面板雙虎與航空股的法人對作，小心接刀
strategies.strategy_content: 這盤面最精彩的就是面板雙虎和航空股了。外資狂掃群創、長榮航，擺明了是賭跌深反彈跟疫後復甦題材。但你看看投信，卻在倒貨群創、長榮航，這就是法人之間對產業前景看法分歧，外資可能在鎖碼，但投信可能認為短期壓力還在，趁機調節。韭菜們，這種對作盤最容易被割，沒看清楚別亂接刀！

strategies.strategy_title: 策略三：電子權值股與ETF的提款機效應，資金大挪移
strategies.strategy_content: 外資跟自營商這兩天把台積電、聯電、力積電這些電子權值股，還有0050這種大盤ETF當提款機，狂賣！這代表什麼？代表資金正在從高價電子股撤出，不是獲利了結就是對未來展望保守。這些錢跑去哪了？一部分就跑到金融、傳產這些避風港了。肖年仔，別再傻傻追高電子股了，主力都在跑了！

strategies.strategy_title: 策略四：投信作帳與內資卡位低基期傳產
strategies.strategy_content: 投信大買南亞、台塑化、興富發、統一這些傳產和食品股，這很明顯是本土國家隊在作帳。南亞在外資賣、投信買的情況下，顯示投信看好塑化股的低基期反彈，或是為基金績效做最後衝刺。興富發、統一這種防禦性或有特定題材的，也是投信作帳的好標的。國際上黃豆價格上漲，也可能讓食品股有題材，這就是內資的盤算。

stock_uncle_insight.summary: 肖年仔，看清楚沒？外資、投信、自營商都在玩大風吹，電子股被當提款機，錢都往金融、傳產這些避風港跑，別傻傻去接刀啊！這盤面就是一個字：「亂」！

top_brokerages_analysis.uncle_logic: 高盛這外資大咖，狂掃面板雙虎之一的群創，這不是短線隔日沖，是看好面板產業底部反彈的波段鎖碼，準備等著拉抬出貨，肖年仔別以為外資都傻傻的。
凱基台北這分點，肖年仔都知道是隔日沖大本營。買金融股，通常是看準短期波動，隔天就準備倒貨，割韭菜，別傻傻跟單，不然被割了別哭夭。
元大投信自家分點大買南亞，這擺明了是投信在作帳或基金建倉，跟外資對作，準備拉抬股價，韭菜們要跟上嗎？這就是本土國家隊的盤算。
摩根大通這外資大咖，大賣元大台灣50，這不是在避險就是在調節部位，看來對大盤指數短期不看好，資金正在從權值股中撤出，這就是大戶的風向球。

english_professor_news.title: Major car dealer cuts 40% of its locations, issues serious warning

level1_blind.text:
Sure, plenty buy them, but suffocating monthly loan payments mean the "affording" part isn't exactly met.

For decades, we shrugged off the warning that a new car loses 10% of its value the second it leaves the lot. The counter-argument was simple: You paid for peace of mind and the guarantee you wouldn't end up stranded on the road.

According to Edmunds, the average monthly new-car payment has hit a record $777, and 20.3% of buyers pay $1,000 or more monthly. To cope, many stretch loans over six or seven years. Edmunds' Ivan Drury calls this a "mathematical trap," warning that pairing a 7.0% APR with an 84-month loan means handing over nearly $10,000 in interest alone, leaving buyers "highly vulnerable to falling underwater."

Used-car buyers are squeezed just as hard, financing an average of $30,414 at 10.5% interest. For subprime buyers, Experian data show interest rates averaging a staggering 19.4% to 21.7%.

That pressure isn't just hurting buyers. It is also hitting the dealerships that specialize in financing customers with weaker credit. Now, one of the largest chains in the country has dramatically reduced its footprint.

A major automotive retailer that operates a chain of used-car dealerships, America's Car-Mart reported on July 14, 2026, its fourth-quarter and full-year results for the period ended April 30, 2026.

The car dealer, which specializes in the "buy here, pay here" (integrated auto sales and financing) market, reported total revenue of $1.281 billion, down by 7.9% from fiscal 2025.

Net loss per share was $16.79, compared to earnings per share of $2.38.Source: America's Car-Mart official press release

level2_keywords.meaning: 貸款還款，指借款人定期向貸款機構支付的款項，通常包含本金與利息。
level2_keywords.example: 「Many car buyers are struggling with high monthly loan payments due to rising interest rates.」

level2_keywords.meaning: 年利率，指貸款或投資的年度成本或收益率，包含所有費用。
level2_keywords.example: 「A high APR on a car loan can significantly increase the total amount paid over the loan term.」

level2_keywords.meaning: 次級貸款買家，指信用評分較低、風險較高的借款人，通常需要支付更高的利率。
level2_keywords.example: 「Lenders often charge higher interest rates to subprime buyers to offset the increased risk of default.」

level2_keywords.meaning: 負資產，指資產的市場價值低於其未償還的貸款餘額，常用於房地產或汽車貸款情境。
level2_keywords.example: 「Many car owners find themselves underwater when their vehicle's value depreciates faster than they pay off the loan.」

level2_keywords.meaning: 每股淨虧損，指公司在某段時間內的總虧損除以流通在外的普通股股數，是衡量公司盈利能力的指標。
level2_keywords.example: 「The company reported a significant net loss per share, indicating a challenging quarter for its financial performance.」

english_professor_news.level2_context: 各位同學，這則新聞反映了當前美國汽車市場的一個嚴峻挑戰。在過去幾年，由於供應鏈問題和消費者需求，新車和二手車的價格都居高不下。然而，更深層的問題在於，為了負擔這些高價車輛，許多消費者被迫拉長貸款期限，並在高利率環境下承擔沉重的月付金。特別是信用評分較低的「次級貸款買家」，他們面臨的利率更高，更容易陷入「負資產」的困境。這不僅讓買家壓力山大，也直接衝擊到那些主要服務這類客戶的汽車經銷商。新聞中提到的 America's Car-Mart 就是一個典型的例子，他們因為客戶還款能力下降，導致營收下滑，甚至出現了每股淨虧損，不得不縮減業務規模。這顯示了高利率環境對消費性貸款市場的連鎖反應，以及對相關產業的巨大影響。

level3_translation.sentence: Sure, plenty buy them, but suffocating monthly loan payments mean the "affording" part isn't exactly met.
level3_translation.translation: 「當然，很多人會買車，但那種令人喘不過氣的每月貸款還款，讓『負擔得起』這件事根本沒辦法實現。」

level3_translation.sentence: For decades, we shrugged off the warning that a new car loses 10% of its value the second it leaves the lot.
level3_translation.translation: 「數十年來，我們對新車一離開車廠就立刻折損一成價值的警告，都只是聳聳肩不以為意。」

level3_translation.sentence: The counter-argument was simple: You paid for peace of mind and the guarantee you wouldn't end up stranded on the road.
level3_translation.translation: 「當時的反駁論點很簡單：你花錢買的是一份安心，以及不會在路上拋錨的保證。」

level3_translation.sentence: According to Edmunds, the average monthly new-car payment has hit a record $777, and 20.3% of buyers pay $1,000 or more monthly.
level3_translation.translation: 「根據 Edmunds 的數據，新車的平均每月還款金額已創下 777 美元的歷史新高，而且有 20.3% 的買家每月支付 1,000 美元或更多。」

level3_translation.sentence: To cope, many stretch loans over six or seven years.
level3_translation.translation: 「為了應付，許多人將貸款期限拉長到六或七年。」

level3_translation.sentence: Edmunds' Ivan Drury calls this a "mathematical trap," warning that pairing a 7.0% APR with an 84-month loan means handing over nearly $10,000 in interest alone, leaving buyers "highly vulnerable to falling underwater."
level3_translation.translation: 「Edmunds 的 Ivan Drury 將此稱為『數學陷阱』，他警告說，將 7.0% 的年利率（APR）與 84 個月的貸款期限結合，光是利息就要支付將近 1 萬美元，這讓買家『極易陷入負資產的困境』。」

level3_translation.sentence: Used-car buyers are squeezed just as hard, financing an average of $30,414 at 10.5% interest.
level3_translation.translation: 「二手車買家也同樣被壓得喘不過氣，他們平均融資 30,414 美元，卻要支付 10.5% 的利息。」

level3_translation.sentence: For subprime buyers, Experian data show interest rates averaging a staggering 19.4% to 21.7%.
level3_translation.translation: 「對於次級貸款買家來說，Experian 的數據顯示，平均利率高達驚人的 19.4% 到 21.7%。」

level3_translation.sentence: That pressure isn't just hurting buyers.
level3_translation.translation: 「這種壓力不只傷害了買家。」

level3_translation.sentence: It is also hitting the dealerships that specialize in financing customers with weaker credit.
level3_translation.translation: 「它也衝擊到那些專門為信用較差客戶提供融資服務的汽車經銷商。」

level3_translation.sentence: Now, one of the largest chains in the country has dramatically reduced its footprint.
level3_translation.translation: 「現在，美國最大的連鎖經銷商之一已經大幅縮減了其業務規模。」

level3_translation.sentence: A major automotive retailer that operates a chain of used-car dealerships, America's Car-Mart reported on July 14, 2026, its fourth-quarter and full-year results for the period ended April 30, 2026.
level3_translation.translation: 「作為一家經營二手車經銷商連鎖店的大型汽車零售商，America's Car-Mart 在 2026 年 7 月 14 日公布了截至 2026 年 4 月 30 日的第四季和全年財報。」

level3_translation.sentence: The car dealer, which specializes in the "buy here, pay here" (integrated auto sales and financing) market, reported total revenue of $1.281 billion, down by 7.9% from fiscal 2025.
level3_translation.translation: 「這家專營『在此買、在此付』（整合汽車銷售與融資）市場的汽車經銷商，報告其總營收為 12.81 億美元，較 2025 財年下降了 7.9%。」

level3_translation.sentence: Net loss per share was $16.79, compared to earnings per share of $2.38.Source: America's Car-Mart official press release
level3_translation.translation: 「每股淨虧損為 16.79 美元，而去年同期每股盈餘為 2.38 美元。資料來源：America's Car-Mart 官方新聞稿。」

english_professor_news.title: Dow Jones Futures Fall As U.S.-Iran Attacks Escalate; Google, Tesla, AMD Ahead

level1_blind.text: Dow Jones Futures Fall As U.S.-Iran Attacks Escalate; Google, Tesla, AMD Ahead

level2_keywords.meaning: 道瓊期貨，是追蹤道瓊工業指數未來表現的金融衍生性商品，常用來預測開盤走勢。
level2_keywords.example: 「Dow Jones Futures often react to major geopolitical events before the market opens.」

level2_keywords.meaning: 升級，指衝突或緊張情勢加劇，對市場情緒有負面影響。
level2_keywords.example: 「The escalating tensions in the Middle East caused oil prices to surge.」

level2_keywords.meaning: 下跌，指股價、指數或期貨價格下降。
level2_keywords.example: 「Market analysts predict a further fall in tech stocks if inflation remains high.」

level2_keywords.meaning: 攻擊，在此指軍事行動或衝突事件，可能引發地緣政治風險，影響市場穩定。
level2_keywords.example: 「The recent attacks in the region have heightened concerns among global investors.」

level2_keywords.meaning: 表現優異/領先，指某個股票或產業的表現超越大盤或同業。
level2_keywords.example: 「Despite the market downturn, some semiconductor stocks are still moving ahead.」

english_professor_news.level2_context: 各位同學，這則新聞標題點出了幾個重要的市場動態。首先，『道瓊期貨下跌』代表投資人對未來市場走勢感到悲觀，通常是受到重大負面消息影響。而這裡的負面消息就是『美國與伊朗的衝突升級』，地緣政治緊張局勢往往會引發市場避險情緒，導致資金流向相對安全的資產，股市則可能承壓。然而，在這種大盤普遍受壓的情況下，『Google、Tesla、AMD 等公司卻表現領先』，這可能代表市場對這些科技巨頭的長期成長潛力仍有信心，或者它們在特定領域（如AI、電動車、高效能運算）的表現足以抵銷宏觀經濟的負面影響。這也提醒我們，即使大盤走弱，個別具備競爭力的公司仍有機會逆勢上揚，但地緣政治風險仍是投資人必須密切關注的變數。

level3_translation.sentence: Dow Jones Futures Fall As U.S.-Iran Attacks Escalate; Google, Tesla, AMD Ahead
level3_translation.translation: 各位同學，這句話的意思是：由於美國與伊朗之間的衝突情勢升級，導致道瓊期貨指數下跌；然而，Google、特斯拉（Tesla）和超微（AMD）等科技巨頭的股價表現卻逆勢領先。

english_professor_news.title: Venture Global (VG) Soars as Geopolitical Tensions Fuel Natural Gas Rally

level1_blind.text:
Venture Global climbed by 12.7 percent week-on-week, as investors rotated their portfolios into energy stocks amid the surging prices of oil and gas driven by escalating geopolitical tensions.

As of Friday, Bloomberg data showed that August Henry Hub natural gas futures traded up by 1.85 percent to $2.91 amid concerns over tighter global gas supplies.

Crude benchmarks also jumped sharply. Brent climbed by 4.59 percent to $88.10, while West Texas Intermediate increased by 4.48 percent to $82.49—both at their highest levels in about a month.

The latest surge in energy prices was sparked by the renewed tensions between the US and Iran.

On Friday, Kuwait—one of the world's 10 largest oil producers—said that Iran damaged a power and water desalination plant following a missile attack, sparking a fire that affected a large number of its electricity-generating units.

Earlier this month, President Donald Trump signaled the collapse of Washington's temporary ceasefire with Tehran, which could have paved the way for a permanent peace deal, saying in a social media post that the US has reinstated the Iranian blockade in the Strait of Hormuz after Iran allegedly violated the ceasefire terms by continuing to attack or threaten commercial ships and conducting military operations despite the agreement.

Iran, which sits along a chokepoint through which roughly 20 percent of the global crude oil supply passes, said that it holds authority over the waterway.

Latest available data on Marine Traffic said that a total of 57 transits were recorded in the Strait of Hormuz last weekend, versus 130 daily before the conflict began.

level2_keywords.example: 「地緣政治緊張」是影響全球能源市場的關鍵因素。
「天然氣期貨」價格的波動，常反映市場對未來能源供需的預期。
「原油基準價」如布蘭特原油和西德州原油，是全球油價的重要參考指標。
針對重要航道的「封鎖」行動，可能嚴重衝擊全球貿易與能源供應。
霍爾木茲海峽是全球「戰略要衝」，對原油運輸至關重要。

english_professor_news.level2_context:
各位同學，這篇新聞主要在講，由於中東地區的地緣政治緊張局勢升溫，特別是美國與伊朗之間的衝突加劇，導致全球能源市場出現劇烈波動。我們可以觀察到，原油和天然氣的價格因此飆漲，投資人也紛紛將資金轉入能源類股，像Venture Global這樣的公司股價就應聲上漲。
這背後的原因，是伊朗與美國在霍爾木茲海峽這個全球重要的石油運輸咽喉點上，關係再度惡化。伊朗被指控違反停火協議，攻擊商船，美國也因此重啟對伊朗的封鎖。由於全球約有五分之一的原油供應都必須經過霍爾木茲海峽，任何該地區的不穩定，都會立即引發市場對原油供應中斷的擔憂，進而推升油價。
所以，這不僅僅是單純的能源價格上漲，更是地緣政治風險如何直接衝擊全球經濟與產業供應鏈的一個鮮明案例。對於財經界來說，這意味著能源成本的增加，可能影響企業獲利，同時也凸顯了能源安全與供應鏈韌性的重要性。

level3_translation.sentence: Venture Global climbed by 12.7 percent week-on-week, as investors rotated their portfolios into energy stocks amid the surging prices of oil and gas driven by escalating geopolitical tensions.
level3_translation.translation: Venture Global的股價本週上漲了12.7%，因為地緣政治緊張局勢升溫，推動油氣價格飆漲，投資人紛紛將投資組合轉向能源類股。

level3_translation.sentence: As of Friday, Bloomberg data showed that August Henry Hub natural gas futures traded up by 1.85 percent to $2.91 amid concerns over tighter global gas supplies.
level3_translation.translation: 截至週五，彭博社數據顯示，由於市場擔憂全球天然氣供應趨緊，8月份亨利港天然氣期貨價格上漲1.85%，來到每百萬英熱單位2.91美元。

level3_translation.sentence: Crude benchmarks also jumped sharply.
level3_translation.translation: 國際原油基準價也大幅跳漲。

level3_translation.sentence: Brent climbed by 4.59 percent to $88.10, while West Texas Intermediate increased by 4.48 percent to $82.49—both at their highest levels in about a month.
level3_translation.translation: 布蘭特原油上漲4.59%，來到每桶88.10美元，而西德州中級原油則上漲4.48%，來到每桶82.49美元——兩者都創下近一個月來的新高。

level3_translation.sentence: The latest surge in energy prices was sparked by the renewed tensions between the US and Iran.
level3_translation.translation: 這波能源價格的最新漲勢，是由於美國與伊朗之間關係再度緊張所引發。

level3_translation.sentence: On Friday, Kuwait—one of the world's 10 largest oil producers—said that Iran damaged a power and water desalination plant following a missile attack, sparking a fire that affected a large number of its electricity-generating units.
level3_translation.translation: 週五，全球十大產油國之一的科威特表示，伊朗在一次飛彈襲擊後破壞了該國的一座發電與海水淡化廠，引發火災並影響了大量發電機組。

level3_translation.sentence: Earlier this month, President Donald Trump signaled the collapse of Washington's temporary ceasefire with Tehran, which could have paved the way for a permanent peace deal, saying in a social media post that the US has reinstated the Iranian blockade in the Strait of Hormuz after Iran allegedly violated the ceasefire terms by continuing to attack or threaten commercial ships and conducting military operations despite the agreement.
level3_translation.translation: 本月稍早，美國總統川普在社群媒體上發文表示，華府與德黑蘭之間的臨時停火協議已告破裂，這項協議原本可能為永久和平鋪平道路；川普稱，由於伊朗涉嫌違反停火條款，持續攻擊或威脅商船並進行軍事行動，美國已在霍爾木茲海峽恢復對伊朗的封鎖。

level3_translation.sentence: Iran, which sits along a chokepoint through which roughly 20 percent of the global crude oil supply passes, said that it holds authority over the waterway.
level3_translation.translation: 伊朗位於一個全球約20%原油供應必經的戰略要衝，該國聲稱對這條水道擁有主權。

level3_translation.sentence: Latest available data on Marine Traffic said that a total of 57 transits were recorded in the Strait of Hormuz last weekend, versus 130 daily before the conflict began.
level3_translation.translation: 根據船舶追蹤網站Marine Traffic的最新數據，上週末霍爾木茲海峽共記錄到57艘船隻通過，而衝突發生前每天約有130艘。

market_linker_insight.market_connection: 今日台股大戶籌碼動向與國際財經新聞之間，浮現了清晰的避險與趨勢部署邏輯。首先，國際油氣價格因美伊地緣政治緊張升級（新聞2、3）而飆漲，直接刺激了國內法人（投信）對原物料相關產業的積極佈局。投信大買南亞與台塑化，顯然是預期能源成本上升將推動石化產品價格，提前卡位通膨受惠股。外資同步大買中鋼，也印證了這股對原物料板塊的青睞。摩根大通大賣元大台灣50，更顯示外資在整體市場上採取了部分獲利了結或避險的策略。然而，在科技板塊，外資則呈現明顯的撤出姿態，大舉賣超台積電、聯電、力積電等半導體權值股，甚至連元大台灣50 ETF也遭大幅拋售。這可能反映了兩層考量：一是地緣政治風險升溫引發的全球市場避險情緒，促使資金從高風險的科技股流出；二是美國汽車經銷商大幅裁撤據點並發出嚴峻警告（新聞1），暗示終端消費需求，特別是高價商品如汽車，正因高利率與高貸款壓力而面臨逆風，進而影響相關供應鏈。儘管台股盤面上外資對群創出現大買，但投信卻同步大賣，且外資也賣超友達，顯示面板產業內部存在分歧，或外資對群創有特定非車用領域的佈局考量。整體而言，今日大戶操作透露出對能源通膨的預期性佈局，以及對科技產業潛在逆風的謹慎態度。
